title: Completed Series Tags JavaScript Boundary Mitigation
summary: Completed the Series Tags JavaScript inventory mitigation by keeping scoring and report rendering in focused modules, moving offline-session handling into an explicitly activated workflow, and extracting import preview/apply orchestration into a lazy workflow module.
effect: The Series Tags route now stays closer to a boot/event/modal coordination shell; normal route load no longer reads or overlays offline session data, and import service behavior has an explicit owner for future changes.
